creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Here is a new shar.  It will pick up the new distfile on my site:

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#  utopia
#  utopia/Makefile
#  utopia/distinfo
#  utopia/pkg-plist
#  utopia/pkg-descr
#
echo c - utopia
mkdir -p utopia > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - utopia/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >utopia/Makefile << 'f76c6986e01cc33981a7ca51c4f1e9cd'
X# New ports collection makefile for:  utopia
X# Date created:                       Fri, 26 Feb 2010 16:40:00 EST
X# Whom:                               James Bailie <jimmy@mammothcheese.ca>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=  utopia
XPORTVERSION=  1.0
XCATEGORIES=   print
XMASTER_SITES= http://www.mammothcheese.ca/
X
XMAINTAINER=   jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
XCOMMENT=   Adobe Utopia typeface for Groff
X
XDATADIR= ${PREFIX}/share/utopia
X
XMAN7=           utopia_font.7
X
XMANCOMPRESSED=   yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
f76c6986e01cc33981a7ca51c4f1e9cd
echo x - utopia/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >utopia/distinfo << 'a3533d01b5875093a8ee4627175daa52'
XMD5 (utopia-1.0.tar.gz) = 8aa1f6348bedd5a6b18226b7459dbaae
XSHA256 (utopia-1.0.tar.gz) = 
7b85e5902052c1f4398c2511fecc51daf308a5e3fe83accbbfc84f9cd37b2e4f
XSIZE (utopia-1.0.tar.gz) = 227481
a3533d01b5875093a8ee4627175daa52
echo x - utopia/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >utopia/pkg-plist << '62b7c3fa88fcb3a3d2b99130079bee72'
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/DESC
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/UB
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/UBI
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/UI
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/UR
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/putr.afm
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/putr.pfa
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/putri.afm
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/putri.pfa
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/putb.afm
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/putb.pfa
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/putbi.afm
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/putbi.pfa
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/LICENSE
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/text.enc
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/textmap
X%%DATADIR%%/devps/download.old
X@unexec /usr/bin/sed -I backup -e "/Utopia Begin/,/Utopia End/d" 
/usr/share/groff_font/devps/d
X@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/devps
X@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
62b7c3fa88fcb3a3d2b99130079bee72
echo x - utopia/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >utopia/pkg-descr << '601cd7367d81a6835647346a69cae91f'
XThis port provides the PostScript Type 1 version of Adobe Utopia for use
Xwith GNU Troff, as it is configured in a FreeBSD basic install.
X
XFor details on usage, invoke:  man utopia_font.
X
XWWW: http://www.mammothcheese.ca/munger.html
X
X--
XJames Bailie <jimmy@mammothcheese.ca>
Xhttp://www.mammothcheese.ca
601cd7367d81a6835647346a69cae91f
exit
